title: Mines Ministry deems 58 companies eligible to participate in critical minerals recycling scheme
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Mines Ministry has declared 58 companies as eligible.
*   These companies can now participate in a critical minerals recycling scheme.
*   The initiative focuses on boosting the recycling of vital critical minerals.

title: Supreme Court defers hearing on PIL alleging banking fraud by Anil Ambani-led ADAG to May 8
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Supreme Court has deferred a hearing on a Public Interest Litigation (PIL).
*   The PIL alleges banking fraud by the Anil Ambani-led ADAG group.
*   The hearing has been rescheduled for May 8.

title: Lift abortion time limit for minor rape survivors: Supreme Court
content:
The Supreme Court has suggested removing or extending the current time limit for abortions.
*   This proposed change specifically applies to minor survivors of rape.
*   The aim is to allow these vulnerable individuals access to abortion services regardless of how far along their pregnancy is.

title: Supreme Court asks petitioner to turn in first-generation copy of leaked Manipur audio to forensic lab
content:
The Supreme Court has directed the petitioner to submit a leaked audio file.
*   The court specifically requires a "first-generation copy" of the audio.
*   This copy is to be provided to a forensic lab for examination, concerning Manipur-related content.

title: Karnataka Cabinet approves Integrated Satellite Township project in Bengaluru South district at a cost of ₹18,133 crore
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   The Karnataka Cabinet has approved an Integrated Satellite Township project.
*   The project will be developed in Bengaluru South district.
*   Its estimated cost is ₹18,133 crore.
